analysis:
【今日摘要】
今天市場情緒主要圍繞著SpaceX、Nvidia和晶片股的表現。SpaceX的股價大幅上漲，引起市場的關注，Morningstar表示Cursor收購將推動SpaceX進入「最昂貴」的領域。Nvidia的股價下跌16%，受中國DeepSeek引發的AI全面洗牌影響。晶片股也下跌，受供應鏈和需求的影響。市場評論家認為，Nvidia和其他AI巨頭的股價下跌可能是恐慌的情緒過度。

【結語】
散戶投資人務必謹慎評估市場情緒和個股表現。今日市場的情緒波動可能是短期的，投資人應該保持冷靜和耐心。投資人應該根據個股的基本面和長期發展趨勢進行投資決策，而不是僅僅追隨市場的短期波動。

【精選個股】
NVDA - Nvidia - Nvidia的股價下跌可能是短期恐慌的情緒過度，投資人應該保持冷靜和耐心。
SHOP - Shopify - Shopify推出AI在其平台的整合，整合了其商務工具與外部AI驅動的產品發現。
TSLA - Tesla - Tesla的股價表現受到市場情緒的影響，但投資人應該關注公司的基本面和長期發展趨勢。

風險提醒：投資市場有風險，投資人應該謹慎評估個股的基本面和市場情緒。

items.title: Dow Jones Futures Rise Before Warsh's Fed Debut; SpaceX Keeps Rising, Four Stocks In Buy Areas
items.summary: The Dow Jones hit a new high and SpaceX kept rising. But chips and most AI stocks fell. Fed chief Kevin Warsh's comments will be in focus Wednesday.
items.zh_title: 道瓊指數未來上漲，前瞻華盛頓的聯邦儲備理事會首次登場；SpaceX持續上漲，四檔股票進入買盤區域
items.zh_point: 道瓊指數創新高，SpaceX持續上漲，但晶片股和大部分AI股則下跌。聯邦儲備理事會主席凱文·沃許將於星期三發表意見。

items.title: JPMorgan Chase (JPM) Stock After 25% Yearly Gain Is The Price Still Reasonable
items.summary: If you are wondering whether JPMorgan Chase stock still offers value at current levels, this article walks through what the numbers actually say and how they fit together. The stock last closed at US$331.14, with returns of 5.9% over 7 days, 11.2% over 30 days, 1.7% year to date and 25.3% over 1 year, which has put valuation front of mind for many investors. Recent coverage has focused on JPMorgan Chase as one of the major U.S. banks at the center of conversations about interest rates,...
items.zh_title: 摩根大通 (JPM) 股價仍可接受嗎？
items.zh_point: 摩根大通股價近期大幅上漲25%，投資者關心的是當前股價是否仍有合理價值。

items.title: Shopify (SHOP) Backs Management At 2026 Meeting As Shareholders Reject AI Policy
items.summary: Shopify (NasdaqGS:SHOP) shareholders approved all management proposals at the 2026 annual meeting, including executive compensation plans. Investors voted on a dedicated artificial intelligence policy, which did not pass, effectively backing the company’s current AI approach. Shopify continues rolling out AI across its platform, with its Sidekick AI assistant gaining traction among merchants. The company expanded AI-driven product discovery, integrating its commerce tools with external...
items.zh_title: Shopify 支持管理層 2026 年會議決策 股東反對 AI 政策
items.zh_point: Shopify 股東在 2026 年會議上通過了管理層的所有提案，包括行政薪酬計畫。投資者投票通過了專門的人工智慧政策，但未通過，有效支持公司目前的 AI 方針。Shopify ongoing 推出 AI 在其平台的整合，Sidekick AI 助手在商家中獲得了關注。公司擴展了 AI驅動的產品發現，整合了其商務工具與外部...

items.title: SPCX Stock Jumps Overnight: Cursor Deal Pushes SpaceX Deeper Into 'Most Expensive' Territory, Morningstar Says
items.summary: Morningstar cut its fair value estimate to $62 from $63 after the Cursor acquisition, implying a 69% downside from current levels.
items.zh_title: SpaceX 股價大幅上漲：Morningstar 表示Cursor 收購將推動SpaceX進入「最昂貴」的領域
items.zh_point: Morningstar 將SpaceX的公平估值從63美元降至62美元，意味著目前股價將下跌69%。

items.title: Can Nvidia Stock Reach $743 in the Next 12 Months?
items.summary: That would require the stock to more than triple in the next year.
items.zh_title: Nvidia 股票是否能在下一年達到 743 美元？
items.zh_point: 為了達到這個目標，Nvidia 股票需要在下一年翻三倍。

items.title: SpaceX options debut signals 'expensive' and 'dangerous' bets, strategist says
items.summary: Options on SpaceX have started trading after the company's IPO, and they show a wide variation in bets.
items.zh_title: SpaceX選擇權首次交易表明「昂貴」和「危險」的押注
items.zh_point: SpaceX選擇權交易開始後，表明投資者對公司未來的預期存在著極大差異。

items.title: Technical factors are adding fuel to SpaceX's meme stock fire
items.summary: Options, leveraged ETFs and index arbitrage are likely boosting the stock ahead of its inclusion in some benchmark stock indexes.
items.zh_title: 技術因素助長SpaceX的股價火爆
items.zh_point: SpaceX的股價因選擇權、加杠杆ETF和指數套利而受益，預計將在某些基準股指數中被納入。

items.title: U.S. holds off blacklisting China's DeepSeek, more than 100 firms deemed security risks
items.summary: DeepSeek, CXMT and other companies were approved by an interagency committee last year for addition to the Commerce Department's Entity List.
items.zh_title: 美國暫緩將中國DeepSeek列黑名單，超過100家公司被視為安全風險
items.zh_point: 美國商務部Entity List的委員會曾於去年批准將DeepSeek、CXMT等公司列入黑名單，但美國最後暫緩了這項決定，同時將超過100家公司視為安全風險。

items.title: Japan May exports grow at fastest pace in over three years, beating estimates, as chip demand soars
items.summary: Japan's exports in May grew at their fastest pace since November 2022, boosted by robust demand for cars and semiconductors.
items.zh_title: 日本五月出口增長最快超過三年，超越預期，晶片需求大增
items.zh_point: 日本五月出口增長最快超過三年，出口額增長5.2%，遠超預期增長2.5%，主要受需求增強的汽車和半導體產品影響。

items.title: Telegram's Durov says India punishing 150 million users after country temporarily bans messaging app
items.summary: India has temporarily restricted access to the messaging app Telegram in an effort to prevent exam fraud. Telegram has slammed the ban.
items.zh_title: Telegram創辦人杜洛夫批評印度對1500萬用戶施壓
items.zh_point: Telegram在印度暫時被封鎖，原因是該國試圖防止考試作弊。杜洛夫批評印度政府的做法。

items.title: America’s fertility rate has never been lower. Blame smartphones — and these 4 financial realities.
items.summary: Having as many children as families want requires “gender equality, economic stability, decent health and confidence in the future.”
items.zh_title: 美國出生率創下新低　智能手機與這四個財經現實是原因
items.zh_point: 美國出生率創下新低，專家認為這與智能手機的使用以及四個財經現實有關，包括性別平等、經濟穩定、良好的健康狀況以及對未來的信心。

items.title: Oil may move through the Strait of Hormuz first, leaving fertilizer supplies stranded
items.summary: The interim peace agreement between the U.S. and Iran seems to be doing little to answer some of the thornier questions about the Strait of Hormuz, including how much longer it will take for products other than crude to start moving through again.
items.zh_title: 霍爾木茲海峽可能先恢復原油運輸，化肥供應受阻
items.zh_point: 美國與伊朗簽署臨時和平協議後，霍爾木茲海峽的運輸問題仍未得到明確解答，包括原油以外商品何時恢復運輸。

items.title: Intel takes a major step toward turning around a business that’s bleeding cash
items.summary: Intel’s new manufacturing process has entered a stage that signals the company is confident in its ability to bring on external customers, analysts say.
items.zh_title: 英特爾大步向前，試圖扭轉因虧損而出現的財務困境
items.zh_point: 英特爾新製程已進入一階段，分析師認為公司對於吸引外部客戶有信心，表明公司正在嘗試扭轉因虧損而出現的財務困境。

items.title: I’m spending $170,000 to upgrade my home for my aging parents. Can I get tax breaks?
items.summary: “Given that at least half of the remodeling cost is to accommodate my disabled mother, I’m wondering if some of this may be tax deductible.”
items.zh_title: 我花170,000美元為父母改造家居，能否享受稅務優惠？
items.zh_point: 一名父親為了照顧年邁母親進行家居改造，費用高達170,000美元，懷疑是否有部分費用可抵稅。

items.title: Chicken tenders are taking over the world, and KFC is rushing to keep up
items.summary: Goodbye bone-in wings, hello tenders and chicken sandwiches that can be easily eaten in the car.
items.zh_title: 雞排正在佔據世界，肯德基急著趕上
items.zh_point: 肯德基正面臨著一個挑戰：雞排正在取代傳統的雞翅，成為新的消費趨勢。雞排和可在車內輕鬆享用的雞肉三明治正成為市場上的新宠。

items.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
items.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.
items.zh_title: 美國股市大幅下跌，受中國DeepSeek引發的AI全面洗牌影響
items.zh_point: 美國股市大部分下跌，Nasdaq領跌，AI基礎設施製造商股價大幅下跌，Nvidia下跌16%。

items.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
items.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.
items.zh_title: 紐約黃金交易所黃金、白銀跌落
items.zh_point: 紐約黃金交易所黃金和白銀價格下跌，黃金跌幅達1.4%，連續兩天下跌，白銀跌幅達2.5%，連續三天下跌。

items.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
items.summary: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.
items.zh_title: 中國DeepSeek AI的關鍵知識
items.zh_point: 中國新興公司宣稱已經訓練出高表現的AI模型，且成本低廉，沒有使用最先進的晶片。

items.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
items.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.
items.zh_title: 深度尋求不會淹沒美國AI巨頭
items.zh_point: 對於Nvidia、Broadcom等科技巨頭的股價下跌，恐慌的情緒可能過度。

items.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
items.summary: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.
items.zh_title: 科技、媒體與電信週報：市場評論
items.zh_point: DeepSeek、SoFi 等科技、媒體和電信相關企業的最新市場發展與評論。

items.title: Douglas Emmett: An Office REIT Able To Grow Leases, Not Profits Just Yet
items.zh_title: 道格拉斯艾默特：能夠增加租約，但仍未能增加利潤
items.zh_point: 道格拉斯艾默特是一間辦公室房地產信託（REIT），儘管該公司能夠增加租約，但其利潤仍未能跟上增長的步伐。

items.title: Gabelli Enterprise Mergers & Acquisitions Fund Q1 2026 Commentary
items.zh_title: 加貝利企業併購基金 Q1 2026 年評論
items.zh_point: 加貝利企業併購基金 Q1 2026 年表現將於此評論中介紹。

items.title: KDEF: This Korean Defense Fund Is Unique, But Not Quite A Buy Today
items.zh_title: 韓國防衛基金：這個基金有其獨特之處，但今天不適合買入
items.zh_point: 韓國政府推出韓國防衛基金，提供資金支持國防開支，但投資者仍需謹慎評估該基金的投資價值。

items.title: Autodesk: Rating Downgrade As MaintainX Makes Near-Term P&L Uncertain
items.zh_title: Autodesk：評級下調 因為MaintainX使短期利潤不確定
items.zh_point: Autodesk 因為MaintainX 的影響而面臨短期利潤不確定，評級下調。MaintainX 的加入可能會對公司的財務報表產生影響，導致投資者對公司未來財務表現的預期下調。

items.title: SailPoint, Inc. (SAIL) Analyst/Investor Day Transcript
items.zh_title: SailPoint, Inc. (SAIL) 分析師/投資者會議記錄
items.zh_point: SailPoint, Inc. 舉辦分析師/投資者會議，內容未知。

items.title: Travere therapeutics director sells $225,000 of TVTX shares
items.zh_title: Travelere Therapeutics 執行長出售 TVTX 股票 225,000 美元
items.zh_point: Travelere Therapeutics 的執行長出售 TVTX 股票 225,000 美元，可能與公司股價波動或個人財務安排有關。

items.title: Blue Dolphin Energy CEO’s firm buys $35,400 in company shares
items.zh_title: Blue Dolphin Energy CEO的公司買入公司股份 $35,400
items.zh_point: Blue Dolphin Energy CEO的公司買入該公司股份，總金額達 $35,400。

items.title: Form 4 Clearwater Analytics Holdings Inc For: 16 June
items.zh_title: 清水分析科技控股公司 Form 4 報告（2023 年 6 月 16 日）
items.zh_point: 清水分析科技控股公司發布了 Form 4 報告，內容可能與公司管理層的股票交易有關。

items.title: Ambani’s Reliance Jio set to file for $4 bln IPO within days, FT reports
items.zh_title: 安邦的Reliance Jio預計在幾天內提交4億美元IPO申請，FT報導
items.zh_point: 安邦的Reliance Jio即將提交4億美元的首次公開募股（IPO）申請，預計將是印度最大的IPO之一。

items.title: Natera executive chairman sells $21.4 million in shares
items.zh_title: Natera 行政委員會主席出售 2,140 萬美元股票
items.zh_point: Natera 行政委員會主席出售公司股票，總值達 2,140 萬美元。
